tests.name: Verificar estrutura de diretórios
tests.run: test -d service && test -d automation && test -d data-ready

tests.name: Verificar Dockerfile
tests.run: test -f Dockerfile || test -f service/Dockerfile || test -f docker/Dockerfile

tests.name: Verificar automação
tests.run: test -f automation/*.json || test -f automation/*.py || test -f automation/*.js

tests.name: Verificar documentação Data-Ready
tests.run: test -f data-ready/MIGRACAO.md && test -f data-ready/EVENTO_DOMINIO.json && test -f data-ready/INVARIANTES.md && test -f data-ready/CDC_VIEWS.md

tests.name: Build do container
tests.run: if [ -f Dockerfile ]; then docker build -t test-service .; elif [ -f service/Dockerfile ]; then docker build -t test-service service/; elif [ -f docker/Dockerfile ]; then docker build -t test-service -f docker/Dockerfile .; fi
